acceptance_str: By accessing and using Vision PME, you accept and agree to be bound by the terms and provision of this agreement.
license_str: Permission is granted to temporarily access the materials on Vision PME for personal, non-commercial use only.
account_str: You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account and password. You agree to accept responsibility for all activities that occur under your account.
privacy_str: Your use of Vision PME is also governed by our Privacy Policy. Please review our Privacy Policy, which also governs the site.
grant_str: All grant applications are subject to review and approval. Vision PME reserves the right to accept or reject any application at its sole discretion.
information_str: We collect information you provide directly to us, including your name, email address, company information, and other details you submit through our application.
use_infoStr: We use the information we collect to provide, maintain, and improve our services, process grant applications, send you updates about events and opportunities.
sharing_str: We do not share your personal information with third parties except as described in this policy or with your consent.
security_str: We implement appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect your personal information against unauthorized or unlawful processing.
rights_str: You have the right to access, update, or delete your personal information at any time through your account settings.
